hypothesis: If solid-state NEB calculations are initialized and guided by pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (eqV2 or eSEN) for energies, forces, and stresses, then subsequent DFT-restarted SSNEB will converge to the same minimum-energy pathways and transition states as VASP-only runs with significantly fewer iterations and reduced compute time because the ML models place images near the true DFT pathway.
